mainline_ladder_requirement: KF baseline -> Markov -> Markov+SCD -> Round61 -> Round65 candidates on one fixed dataset

extra.candidate_description: Controlled Markov + SCD baseline on the fixed mainline dataset (neutralized trust/cov schedule, iter2 once-per-phase SCD only).

r65_icg_balanced.description: Innovation-consistency gate on both trust-feedback and SCD strength with balanced gain.
r65_icg_balanced.rationale: Core mechanism test: consistency-derived gate controls both internalized feedback aggressiveness and SCD suppression depth.

r65_icg_feedback_priority.description: Stronger consistency gating on trust-feedback path; keep SCD path relatively mild.
r65_icg_feedback_priority.rationale: Ablation-style emphasis: test whether over-correction is mainly from feedback route rather than SCD route.

r65_icg_scd_priority.description: Stronger consistency gating on SCD alpha path; keep trust-feedback path relatively mild.
r65_icg_scd_priority.rationale: Counter-ablation: test whether mis-match risk is dominated by cross-cov suppression timing/strength.

r65_icg_slow_ema_guarded.description: Slower innovation-EMA with moderate gate slope to avoid reacting to transient spikes.
r65_icg_slow_ema_guarded.rationale: Robustness-style variant: reduce gate jitter and see whether smoother consistency estimate helps protected metrics.

no_winner_reason: No candidate cleanly beat Round61 under same-dataset hard-protected gate.

strongest_signal.name: r65_icg_feedback_priority
strongest_signal.signal: best partial signal on r65_icg_feedback_priority: dKg_xx Δ=0.231524, dKg_zz Δ=-0.076755, mean Δ=0.031875, max Δ=0.231524

next_repair_direction: Keep innovation-consistency gating mechanism but repair protected regressions via split gate map: freeze feedback gate floor on yy/Ka_xx path while keeping SCD gate adaptive on xx/zz path.
conclusion_line: Round65 did not produce a clean promotable winner over Round61 on the fixed mainline dataset.

mechanism_learning.worked: Innovation-driven dynamic gate is inspectable and does produce coherent movement on target stats in some variants.
mechanism_learning.not_worked: Coupling one scalar gate to both feedback and SCD can still over-transfer suppression and leak into protected metrics.
mechanism_learning.structural_or_redistribution: Current evidence is mechanism-level partial signal, not yet a structural clean improvement over Round61.

next_actions.keep: NIS-EMA consistency gate as named mechanism and logging interface (innovation_gate_log).
next_actions.remove: Overly aggressive shared gate settings that jointly drag feedback and SCD below safe protected thresholds.
next_actions.repair_direction: Keep innovation-consistency gating mechanism but repair protected regressions via split gate map: freeze feedback gate floor on yy/Ka_xx path while keeping SCD gate adaptive on xx/zz path.
next_actions.new_mechanism_direction: Try dual-channel consistency gate (feedback-channel and SCD-channel with separate target deviations).
